name: codesetu-monorepo
description: Open-source AI coding assistant for Indian developers and enterprises.

scripts.package:vscode: corepack pnpm --dir apps/vscode build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('artifacts',{recursive:true})" && cd apps/vscode && corepack pnpm dlx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --out ../../artifacts/
